description: RPG item icons — weapons, potions, scrolls, accessories. 20 subjects x 4 variations = 80 candidates.
style_prefix: hand-painted fantasy RPG game icon, single item centered on solid dark background, painterly style, clean edges, detailed brushwork, inventory icon
negative: blurry, text, watermark, 3d render, photorealistic, multiple items, cropped, pixel art, cel-shaded, neon colors, gradient background, white background, modern, sci-fi
